enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs on December 1st about his Google Earth recreation project of ancient Rome, his sleep schedule, running errands with his mom, and his enthusiasm for history podcasts including History of Rome and History of Byzantium. He ends the vlog frustrated after accidentally losing video footage by minimizing his recording software.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Excited about the potential for ground-level virtual tours of ancient Rome despite feeling like he's still near the beginning
Can't work on his timeline and listen to History of Rome simultaneously — too much of a headache
Positive; likes that it picks up where History of Rome left off

entities: Duncan (podcast host, likely Duncan Trussell or Dan Carlin)
